var-historical.title: Historical VaR (99%, 10-day)
var-historical.summary: Empirical 99th-percentile loss using non-overlapping 10-day windows. No distribution assumption — uses actual past return distribution.

var-parametric.title: Parametric VaR (Delta-Normal)
var-parametric.summary: Assumes portfolio returns are multivariate normal. VaR = portfolio vol × 2.326 (99th percentile z-score). 10-day via √10 scaling.

var-garch-fhs.title: GARCH-FHS VaR
var-garch-fhs.summary: Filtered Historical Simulation: GARCH(1,1) standardises residuals; bootstrap from them using GARCH-forecast vol. Preserves empirical tail shape.

expected-shortfall.title: Expected Shortfall (CVaR)
expected-shortfall.summary: Average loss in scenarios where VaR is breached — the tail expectation beyond VaR. Coherent risk measure used in Basel IV (97.5% ES).

backtest.title: VaR Backtest (Kupiec + Christoffersen)
backtest.summary: Kupiec tests if violation rate matches 1%. Christoffersen tests if violations are independent (no clustering). Both should pass for a well-calibrated model.

hmm.title: HMM Volatility Regimes
hmm.summary: 2-state Hidden Markov Model fitted to portfolio returns. States: low-vol (calm) and high-vol (stress). Regime-conditioned VaR adjusts estimates by current state.

ic.title: IC — Information Coefficient
ic.summary: Rolling Pearson correlation between a lagged commodity return and a sector return. Measures predictive signal strength over a 63-day window. ICIR = IC mean / IC std.

bh-fdr.title: Benjamini-Hochberg FDR Correction
bh-fdr.summary: Multiple-testing correction applied to ~200+ IC p-values. Controls expected fraction of false discoveries at α=0.05. BH-significant = signal survives correction.

diebold-yilmaz.title: Diebold-Yilmaz Connectedness
diebold-yilmaz.summary: Measures cross-market shock transmission via VAR forecast-error variance decomposition. Total connectedness = % of variance from cross-market shocks.

dcc-garch.title: DCC-GARCH Correlations
dcc-garch.summary: Dynamic Conditional Correlation (Engle 2002): time-varying correlation matrix from GARCH-standardised residuals. Shows how commodity–sector correlations evolve.

component-var.title: Component VaR
component-var.summary: Each stock's marginal contribution to total portfolio VaR. Computed as w_i × ∂VaR/∂w_i. All components sum to total portfolio VaR.

drawdown.title: Portfolio Drawdown
drawdown.summary: Percentage decline from the rolling peak portfolio value. Max drawdown = largest trough-to-peak decline. Measures realised downside risk.
